subject: [PATCH v2 7/9] nfsd: fix partial-write detection in nfsd_direct_write

2026-05-30.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the nfsd_direct_write function where it incorrectly detects short writes and continues writing to the wrong file offset. The issue arises from the fact that vfs_iocb_iter_write advances the iter by the number of bytes written, making segments[i].iter.count hold the residual length instead of the original request length. To fix this, a snapshot of the segment's byte count is taken before the write and compared against host_err to accurately detect short writes. This ensures that any short write breaks the loop and prevents over-reporting *cnt to the NFS client.
